vehicles.slot: Small cap or override button under center console near selector base
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
The G70 uses an 8-speed automatic with a fully electronic override — locate the cap at the selector base and remove it.
Press and hold the electronic override button firmly.
Simultaneously press the brake pedal.
Move the selector to N while holding the override. Confirm N on the display.
CANNOT SHIFT WITHOUT POWER — restore 12V first if battery is dead.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
IMPORTANT: G70 battery is in the TRUNK under the floor panel (remove mat, tray, and toolkit to access).
Use the UNDER-HOOD JUMP TERMINALS (always present) — connect jump pack there, not at the trunk battery.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to N normally.
RWD: lift from front — rear (drive) wheels roll on ground. AWD: FLATBED ONLY.
EPB: hold EPB button with power to release before towing.
vehicles.notes: Battery in trunk. Use under-hood jump terminals. Cannot shift without electrical power — must connect battery first.
vehicles.warn: AWD: flatbed only. Battery in trunk — use under-hood jump terminals.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from front (rear drive wheels roll). AWD: FLATBED ONLY.
towNotes: Cannot shift to neutral without electrical power — connect jump pack first.
AWD: no transfer case neutral — flatbed mandatory.
Battery in trunk — use dedicated under-hood jump posts.

epb.override: Connect jump pack to under-hood terminals. Restore power. Release EPB via button.
steps: Connect jump pack to under-hood 12V terminals.
Press and hold EPB button to release.
If manual release required: Genesis roadside assistance recommended.

vehicles.steeringLock: Electronic steering lock — requires ignition power.

battery.location: TRUNK under floor panel — remove mat, tray, and toolkit to access
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood — dedicated jump-start terminals (positive and negative posts)
battery.warnings: Must restore electrical power before any shifting. AWD: flatbed only.

vehicles.drivetrain: RWD or AWD; EV is AWD
vehicles.slot: Electronic override button under console cap near selector base
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate and remove the cap at the selector base on the center console.
Press and hold the electronic override button.
Press the brake pedal simultaneously.
Move the selector to N. Confirm N on the display.
Electrified G80 (2023+ EV): restore 12V power first — use the under-hood jump terminals.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Battery is in the TRUNK under the floor — use the UNDER-HOOD JUMP TERMINALS to connect your jump pack.
Once 12V power is restored, shift to N normally.
RWD: lift from front — rear (drive) wheels roll. AWD: FLATBED ONLY. Electrified G80 EV: FLATBED ONLY.
Electrified G80: 12V auxiliary only — NEVER touch the orange high-voltage battery cables.
vehicles.notes: Electrified G80 EV (2023+): orange HV cables, flatbed only, 12V auxiliary only.
vehicles.warn: AWD: flatbed only. Electrified G80: FLATBED ONLY, never touch HV.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from front. AWD: FLATBED ONLY. Electrified G80: FLATBED ONLY.
towNotes: Must restore power before shifting in all configurations.
Electrified G80 EV: flatbed only, orange HV system.
Under-hood jump terminals make access easy.

epb.override: Restore 12V via under-hood terminals. EPB button release.
steps: Connect jump pack to under-hood terminals.
If stuck: Genesis Roadside Assistance recommended.

battery.location: TRUNK under floor panel. Under-hood jump terminals available.
battery.warnings: Electrified G80: 12V only, flatbed only. AWD: flatbed only.

vehicles.slot: Electronic override under console near selector
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Find and remove the cap at the selector base on the center console.
Press the electronic override button firmly.
Press brake while holding override.
Move selector to N. Confirm N on the display.
Fully electronic — requires 12V power for all functions. Jump battery first if dead.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Battery in TRUNK under floor — use the UNDER-HOOD JUMP TERMINALS to connect jump pack.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to N normally.
RWD: lift from front. AWD: FLATBED ONLY.
All G90 systems are fully electronic — no mechanical override exists. Power is required.
vehicles.notes: Flagship sedan. Fully electronic — requires 12V power for all functions.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from front. AWD: FLATBED ONLY.
towNotes: Fully electronic — must have power for any procedure.
AWD: no TC neutral — flatbed mandatory.

epb.override: Restore 12V via under-hood terminals. EPB button release.
steps: Connect jump pack to under-hood terminals.

airSuspension.description: Electronic air suspension on higher trims. Self-leveling.
towingNotes: Air suspension self-levels. No special towing procedure needed if functional.
If failed: vehicle may be low. Jump battery to allow normalization.

battery.location: TRUNK under floor. Under-hood jump terminals available.
battery.warnings: AWD: flatbed only. Fully electronic — must restore power first.

vehicles.slot: Electronic selector — override button under console cap
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Remove the cap at the selector base.
Press and hold the electronic override button while pressing the brake pedal.
Move to N. Confirm on display.
Electrified GV70 EV: restore 12V power first before any electronic operation.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
12V battery under the hood — connect jump pack.
Once powered, press brake and shift to N normally.
RWD: lift from front. AWD: FLATBED ONLY. Electrified GV70: FLATBED ONLY.
Electrified GV70: 12V auxiliary only — NEVER touch the high-voltage battery.
vehicles.notes: Electrified GV70 EV: flatbed only, 12V auxiliary only.
vehicles.warn: AWD: flatbed only. Electrified: FLATBED ONLY, 12V only.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from front. AWD: FLATBED ONLY. Electrified: FLATBED ONLY.

epb.override: Restore 12V, hold EPB button to release.
steps: Connect jump pack to under-hood terminals.

battery.location: Under hood (primary). Check door jamb for specifics.
battery.warnings: Electrified: 12V only, flatbed only. AWD: flatbed only.

vehicles.slot: Electronic selector — override under console cap near selector base
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate and remove the cap near the selector base on the center console.
Press and hold the electronic override button firmly.
Press the brake pedal.
Move selector to N. Confirm N on the display.
CRITICAL: Cannot shift without electrical power — jump battery first if dead.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Under-hood jump terminals are always available — connect jump pack there.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to N normally.
RWD: lift from front. AWD: FLATBED ONLY — no transfer case neutral.
Large, heavy SUV — verify flatbed weight rating before loading.
vehicles.notes: Largest Genesis SUV. AWD has no TC neutral. Must have power to shift.
vehicles.warn: AWD: flatbed only. Cannot shift without electrical power.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from front. AWD: FLATBED ONLY.
towNotes: AWD: no transfer case — flatbed mandatory.
Must restore 12V power before any shifting is possible.
Large, heavy SUV — verify flatbed capacity.

epb.override: Restore 12V via under-hood terminals. Hold EPB button to release.
steps: Connect jump pack to under-hood terminals.
Hold EPB button to release parking brake.

battery.location: Under hood or trunk (check door jamb). Under-hood jump terminals always available.
battery.warnings: AWD: flatbed only. Must restore power before shifting.

vehicles.slot: Electronic selector — use touchscreen or selector button to access N
shift: Turn the vehicle to ON/Ready mode.
The Electrified G80 uses an electronic gear selector — no mechanical shift lock slot.
Press and hold the N button on the shift selector for 3 seconds while pressing the brake.
Confirm N is displayed on the instrument cluster.
If all power is lost: attempt to restore 12V power via jump pack before any other action.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
FLATBED ONLY — electric drivetrain. Do NOT tow with driven wheels on ground.
Connect jump pack to 12V auxiliary battery — in the trunk under the cargo floor.
Once 12V power is restored, use the N selector to engage Neutral.
NEVER touch the high-voltage orange-cabled components.
vehicles.notes: EV platform. 12V auxiliary battery in trunk. Flatbed only.
vehicles.warn: FLATBED ONLY. 12V auxiliary battery in TRUNK. Never touch HV system.
towNotes: ELECTRIC VEHICLE: FLATBED ONLY. Never tow with driven wheels on ground.
12V auxiliary battery is in the TRUNK under cargo floor.
NEVER touch or access the high-voltage (HV) system — marked with orange cables.

knownIssues.title: 12V Battery in Trunk
knownIssues.detail: The Electrified G80 has its 12V auxiliary battery in the trunk under the cargo floor, not under the hood. Open the trunk and lift the cargo floor panel to access it.

battery.warnings: Battery in trunk. Never access HV system. Flatbed only.

vehicles.slot: Electronic selector — N button on console
shift: Turn the vehicle to ON/Ready mode.
Press and hold the N button on the gear selector while pressing the brake pedal.
Hold for approximately 3 seconds until N is displayed on the instrument cluster.
If power is lost: restore 12V via jump pack first.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
FLATBED ONLY — electric drivetrain.
Connect jump pack to 12V auxiliary battery — under the hood (driver side, in the engine compartment).
Once 12V power is restored, engage N using the selector button.
NEVER touch the high-voltage components (orange cables).
vehicles.notes: EV. 12V battery under hood. Flatbed only.
vehicles.warn: FLATBED ONLY. Never touch HV system.
towNotes: 12V auxiliary battery is under the hood on the driver side.

battery.warnings: EV — never touch HV system. Flatbed only.
